title: Nexus — Tenant SLA Prerequisite
description: Per-tenant SLA panels are gated because the current HTTP collectors are not observed and do not define tenant_id or user_id labels.

options.content:
## Tenant SLA reporting is not yet measurable

`packages/service-utils` registers HTTP request collectors, but no request hook currently records samples. The collectors also have no `tenant_id` or `user_id` labels. Availability, p95 latency, error budget, and active-user panels would therefore be misleading.

Instrument the shared request lifecycle first, then add bounded-cardinality tenant SLI recording rules before enabling contractual tenant dashboards.

targets.expr: count((up{job="nexus-services"} == 1) unless on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (nexus_http_requests_total{job="nexus-services"})) or vector(0)

panels.title: Current scrape availability (not a tenant SLI)
